sql.statement: SELECT CASE WHEN (DATE(e.driver_license_valid_till) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER < 0 THEN 'Expired' ELSE 'Others' END AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM raw_business_data.employees e WHERE e.driver_license_valid_till IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

WITH expiry_data AS (SELECT CASE WHEN v.free_insurance_valid_till_date IS NOT NULL AND (v.liability_insurance_valid_till IS NULL OR v.free_insurance_valid_till_date <= v.liability_insurance_valid_till) THEN v.free_insurance_valid_till_date WHEN v.liability_insurance_valid_till IS NOT NULL THEN v.liability_insurance_valid_till ELSE NULL END AS nearest_expiry_date FROM raw_business_data.vehicles v), categorized_data AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (DATE(nearest_expiry_date) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER < 0 THEN 'Expired' WHEN (DATE(nearest_expiry_date) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER >= 0 AND (DATE(nearest_expiry_date) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER < 30 THEN 'Expires within 30 days' ELSE 'Others' END AS category FROM expiry_data WHERE nearest_expiry_date IS NOT NULL) SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM categorized_data GROUP BY category ORDER BY CASE category WHEN 'Expired' THEN 1 WHEN 'Expires within 30 days' THEN 2 WHEN 'Others' THEN 3 END

WITH spd AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100.0 AS kmh, LAG(speed/100.0) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_kmh, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (device_time - LAG(device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time))) AS dt_sec FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE 1=1), decels AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, (prev_kmh - kmh) / NULLIF(dt_sec, 0) AS decel_kmh_per_sec FROM spd WHERE prev_kmh IS NOT NULL), events_with_severity AS (SELECT DATE(d.device_time) AS category, CASE WHEN d.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 80 THEN 'Critical' WHEN d.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 THEN 'Warning' ELSE 'Normal' END AS series FROM decels d WHERE d.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 60) SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS value, series FROM events_with_severity GROUP BY category, series ORDER BY series

-- =============================================================================
-- Report: Harsh acceleration & braking events (unified)
-- =============================================================================
-- Detects tracking points where acceleration or deceleration exceeds threshold;
-- returns one row per event with event type (determined by data), unit, date/time,
-- and location. Parameters: :date_from, :date_to (optional, default last 30 days)
-- =============================================================================

WITH params AS (
    SELECT
         CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AS date_from,
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS date_to
),
spd AS (
    SELECT
        device_id,
        device_time,
        speed / 100.0 AS kmh,
        LAG(speed / 100.0) OVER (
            PARTITION BY device_id
            ORDER BY device_time
        ) AS prev_kmh,
        EXTRACT(
            EPOCH FROM (
                device_time
                - LAG(device_time) OVER (
                    PARTITION BY device_id
                    ORDER BY device_time
                )
            )
        ) AS dt_sec
    FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
    CROSS JOIN params p
    WHERE c.device_time >= p.date_from
      AND c.device_time <= p.date_to
      AND c.speed IS NOT NULL
      AND c.latitude IS NOT NULL
      AND c.longitude IS NOT NULL
      AND c.latitude <> 0
      AND c.longitude <> 0
),
rates AS (
    SELECT
        device_id,
        device_time,
        (kmh - prev_kmh) / NULLIF(dt_sec, 0) AS accel_kmh_per_sec,
        (prev_kmh - kmh) / NULLIF(dt_sec, 0) AS decel_kmh_per_sec
    FROM spd
    WHERE prev_kmh IS NOT NULL
),
events_with_severity AS (
    SELECT
        r.device_id,
        r.device_time,
        r.accel_kmh_per_sec,
        r.decel_kmh_per_sec,
        CASE
            WHEN r.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 THEN 'Harsh Acceleration'
            WHEN r.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 THEN 'Harsh Braking'
        END AS event_type,
        CASE
            WHEN r.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 80 OR r.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 80 THEN 'Critical'
            WHEN r.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 OR r.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 THEN 'Warning'
            ELSE 'Normal'
        END AS series
    FROM rates r
    WHERE r.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 OR r.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 60
),
events_with_place AS (
    SELECT
        e.device_id,
        e.device_time,
        e.event_type,
        e.series,
        CASE WHEN e.event_type = 'Harsh Acceleration' THEN e.accel_kmh_per_sec ELSE e.decel_kmh_per_sec END AS rate_kmh_per_sec,
        c.latitude / 1e7 AS latitude,
        c.longitude / 1e7 AS longitude,
        zg.place_zone,
        zg.place_address
    FROM events_with_severity e
    JOIN raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
        ON c.device_id = e.device_id AND c.device_time = e.device_time
    LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT
            zg.zone_label AS place_zone,
            zg.address AS place_address
        FROM business_data.zones_geom zg
        WHERE ST_Within(
            ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(c.longitude / 1e7, c.latitude / 1e7), 4326),
            zg.zone_geom::geometry
        )
        LIMIT 1
    ) zg ON true
)
SELECT
    ep.event_type,
    o.object_label AS unit,
    ep.device_time AS event_datetime,
    DATE(ep.device_time) AS event_date,
    ep.device_time::time AS event_time,
    ROUND(ep.latitude::numeric, 6) AS latitude,
    ROUND(ep.longitude::numeric, 6) AS longitude,
    COALESCE(ep.place_zone, ep.place_address, ep.latitude::text || ', ' || ep.longitude::text) AS place,
    ep.series AS severity,
    ROUND(ep.rate_kmh_per_sec::numeric, 2) AS rate_kmh_per_sec
FROM events_with_place ep
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = ep.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
ORDER BY ep.device_time DESC;

WITH pts AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, latitude/1e7::numeric AS lat, longitude/1e7::numeric AS lon, LAG(latitude/1e7::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_lat, LAG(longitude/1e7::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_lon, speed/100.0 AS kmh, LAG(speed/100.0) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_kmh FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core), bearing AS (SELECT *, atan2(sin(radians(lon-prev_lon))*cos(radians(lat)), cos(radians(prev_lat))*sin(radians(lat)) - sin(radians(prev_lat))*cos(radians(lat))*cos(radians(lon-prev_lon))) * 180/pi() AS heading_change FROM pts WHERE prev_lat IS NOT NULL AND prev_lon IS NOT NULL), events_with_severity AS (SELECT DATE(b.device_time) AS category, CASE WHEN ABS(b.heading_change) >= 50 AND b.kmh >= 30 THEN 'Critical' WHEN ABS(b.heading_change) >= 30 AND b.kmh >= 30 THEN 'Warning' ELSE 'Normal' END AS series FROM bearing b) SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS value, series FROM events_with_severity GROUP BY category, series ORDER BY category, series

WITH ign AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, value::int AS ign_on FROM raw_telematics_data.states WHERE state_name = 'ignition'), spd AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100.0 AS kmh FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core), merged AS (SELECT i.device_id, i.device_time, i.ign_on, s.kmh, LEAD(i.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY i.device_id ORDER BY i.device_time) AS next_time FROM ign i LEFT JOIN spd s ON s.device_id = i.device_id AND s.device_time = i.device_time) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM merged m WHERE m.ign_on = 1 AND (m.kmh IS NULL OR m.kmh < 5) AND m.next_time IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60 >= 5

WITH ign AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, value::int AS ign_on FROM raw_telematics_data.states WHERE state_name = 'ignition'), spd AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100 AS kmh FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core), merged AS (SELECT i.device_id, i.device_time, i.ign_on, s.kmh, LEAD(i.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY i.device_id ORDER BY i.device_time) AS next_time FROM ign i LEFT JOIN spd s ON s.device_id = i.device_id AND s.device_time = i.device_time) SELECT round(COALESCE(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60), 0), 0) AS value FROM merged m WHERE m.ign_on = 1 AND (m.kmh IS NULL OR m.kmh < 5) AND m.next_time IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60 >= 5

WITH ign AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, value::int AS ign_on FROM raw_telematics_data.states WHERE state_name = 'ignition'), spd AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100.0 AS kmh FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core), merged AS (SELECT i.device_id, i.device_time, i.ign_on, s.kmh, LEAD(i.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY i.device_id ORDER BY i.device_time) AS next_time FROM ign i LEFT JOIN spd s ON s.device_id = i.device_id AND s.device_time = i.device_time) SELECT round(COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60), 0),0) AS value FROM merged m WHERE m.ign_on = 1 AND (m.kmh IS NULL OR m.kmh < 5) AND m.next_time IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60 >= 5

WITH spd AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100.0 AS kmh, LAG(speed/100.0) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_kmh, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (device_time - LAG(device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time))) AS dt_sec FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core), accels AS (SELECT device_id, device_time, (kmh - prev_kmh) / NULLIF(dt_sec, 0) AS accel_kmh_per_sec FROM spd WHERE prev_kmh IS NOT NULL), events_with_severity AS (SELECT DATE(a.device_time) AS category, CASE WHEN a.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 80 THEN 'Critical' WHEN a.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 THEN 'Warning' ELSE 'Normal' END AS series FROM accels a WHERE a.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 60) SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS value, series FROM events_with_severity GROUP BY category, series ORDER BY series
